creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
Janne Snabb <snabb@epipe.com> writes:

> Please see PR bin/147934 before committing. The patch in this PR
> (re-)introduces the "uptime += 30" bug in case it is committed.

It's included in my diff along with several other commits

  http://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/mid.cgi?861v6kwgup.fsf

after having waited for reply from edwin@ since August.
Not enough for a commit but at least it builds and works.
